overview: Prime Health HRT is an online telemedicine clinic offering personalized hormone therapies and weight management medications delivered to your home. The process includes a phone consultation, lab work through LabCorp or Quest Diagnostics, an online doctor video consult, and medication delivery in 4-10 business days.
highlights: Compounded medications in multiple forms (injections, tablets, creams)
targetAudience: Patients 24+ seeking remote hormone optimization, weight management, and fertility support.
